FEATURES

One platform. Complete data control.

One platform. Complete data control.

Triple encryption layers, instant access revocation, and real-time audit logs. Every interaction is protected, tracked, and completely under your control.

FEATURES

One platform. Complete data control.

Triple encryption layers, instant access revocation, and real-time audit logs. Every interaction is protected, tracked, and completely under your control.

Source-Level Encryption

Encrypt data at the source before it ever leaves your infrastructure.

Source-Level Encryption

Encrypt data at the source before it ever leaves your infrastructure.

Instant Revocation

Revoke access to shared files instantly, even after they've been sent.

Instant Revocation

Revoke access to shared files instantly, even after they've been sent.

Real-Time Audit Logs

FAQS

Questions? Answers!

Find Some quick answers to the most common questions.

What services do you offer?

We specialize in secure data sharing, source-level encryption, access revocation, audit logging, and compliance.

How long does it take to develop an AI solution?

Depending on the project's complexity, timelines typically range from 2 to 12 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline after our initial discovery call

Do I need technical expertise to work with you?

No technical background is required! We handle all the complexity for you and explain every step in simple, actionable terms

Is my data safe when working with your agency?

Absolutely. We follow strict data privacy protocols, comply with GDPR standards, and offer NDAs to ensure your information stays secure

Feel free to mail us for any enquiries : orbai@support.com
